productDisplayName: Fila Men Black Turf Sports Shoes
description: shoes from fila are made with the finest fabrics crafted in Italy's materials capital, Biella. This Turf shoe from fila is an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. The Sports themed styling, low-top cut and synthetic leather upper showcase the Italian brand's versatile power in innovating. Wear these with corduroy trousers and a polo T-shirt, or with your favourite jeans and a black tee.UpperSleek synthetic leather upper with stitch detailing on the toe boxPerforations on the upperPadded insole for instep comfortCentral lace upsPadded tongueReinforced overlays on the toe box and heel collarMidsolePhylon midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with round suction points, patterned grooves Decoupled heel with a curved midfootShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
